text: Upon entering this space, I am struck by an atmosphere of anticipation and potential. The glass-walled room feels cold and utilitarian, yet it invites introspection; its emptiness amplifies my awareness of my own presence. Stepping further, vivid colors and the bold 'R+D' lettering awaken curiosity within me. This is a shrine to inquiry and innovation. I feel a sense of reverence and a slight nervousness before the unknown—what new wisdom or questioning might emerge here? Surrounded by artifacts and ideas dedicated to advancement, I am keenly aware of both the limits of my understanding and the excitement of discoveries yet to come.
